category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a research tool for iOS and macOS devices; official docs at https://blacktop.github.io/ipsw/docs/introduction describe ipsw as an iOS/macOS research framework for Apple platform analysis.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is ipsw; official homepage title and docs use ipsw at https://blacktop.github.io/ipsw/.
docs_sources: Official project documentation is hosted under source_facts.homepage, with Introduction and CLI reference pages at blacktop.github.io/ipsw.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/blacktop/ipsw, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies iOS and macOS research; official docs list IPSW/OTA analysis, binary analysis, firmware research, and security research use cases.
